purpose: Check whether a Ginkgo HIP sparse/AMG backend can be built on the current ROCm workstation for G9 GPU preconditioner closure.

cmake_error_summary: Initial configure failed because AMDDeviceLibs and ROCm device bitcode were missing from the active /opt/rocm path.
Local extraction of rocm-device-libs_1.0.0.50701-98~22.04 allowed Ginkgo HIP configure to pass.

Ginkgo HIP build still failed in csr_kernels.instantiate.cpp because Ginkgo bfloat16 helpers reference __hip_bfloat16_raw / conversions not available in the installed ROCm 6.0.2 HIP headers, even with GINKGO_ENABLE_BFLOAT16=OFF.

claim_boundary: This receipt does not close G9. It documents that the current workstation can configure Ginkgo HIP with a local device-libs extract, but the external HIP AMG dependency still does not build cleanly against the installed ROCm header/toolchain combination.
